decision: Implement failure clustering and repair-router binding over existing trace ledger records, classify stale/resolved vs active issues, and surface cluster cards in the operator tracker.
internal_findings: TRACE_SPAN_LEDGER_LATEST.jsonl contains 220 records with 4 non-OK records.
Non-OK records are passive evidence in the tracker rather than actionable repair routes.
The visible tracker already has causal sections, so Stage 4 should add a compact failure cluster/repair router surface instead of replacing the tracker.
The smallest durable fix is a cluster report, router binding, validator, and tracker binding generated from the existing trace ledger and graph.

rejected_options.reason: Too broad for bounded Stage 4 and unnecessary because Stage 2/3 artifacts validate.
Would weaken provenance; preserve history and add a derived routing layer instead.
